question: 최신 최대 변동성

question: 현재 가장 높은 변동성 종목
sql: SELECT underlying_id, vol FROM td_dmaqvol WHERE std_date = (SELECT MAX(std_date) FROM td_dmaqvol) ORDER BY vol DESC LIMIT 1

question: 기초자산별 변동성 순위
sql: SELECT underlying_id, vol FROM td_dmaqvol WHERE std_date = (SELECT MAX(std_date) FROM td_dmaqvol) ORDER BY vol DESC LIMIT 50

question: 최신일 기초자산 변동성 비교
sql: SELECT underlying_id, vol FROM td_dmaqvol WHERE std_date = (SELECT MAX(std_date) FROM td_dmaqvol) ORDER BY vol DESC

question: 변동성 높은 기초자산 순서로
sql: SELECT underlying_id, vol FROM td_dmaqvol WHERE std_date = (SELECT MAX(std_date) FROM td_dmaqvol) ORDER BY vol DESC LIMIT 50

question: 변동성 유형별 vol vs quanto_vol
sql: SELECT vol_type, AVG(vol) AS avg_vol, AVG(quanto_vol) AS avg_quanto_vol FROM td_dmaqvol WHERE std_date = (SELECT MAX(std_date) FROM td_dmaqvol) GROUP BY vol_type ORDER BY vol_type

question: vol_type별 평균 변동성 비교
sql: SELECT vol_type, AVG(vol) AS avg_vol, AVG(quanto_vol) AS avg_quanto_vol FROM td_dmaqvol WHERE std_date = (SELECT MAX(std_date) FROM td_dmaqvol) GROUP BY vol_type ORDER BY vol_type

question: 변동성 유형 구분 현황
sql: SELECT vol_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(vol) AS avg_vol FROM td_dmaqvol WHERE std_date = (SELECT MAX(std_date) FROM td_dmaqvol) GROUP BY vol_type ORDER BY vol_type

question: 변동성 vs 콴토 변동성 상관 분포
sql: SELECT underlying_id, vol, quanto_vol FROM td_dmaqvol WHERE std_date = (SELECT MAX(std_date) FROM td_dmaqvol) ORDER BY vol DESC LIMIT 100

question: vol과 quanto_vol 관계

question: 콴토 변동성 산점도
sql: SELECT underlying_id, vol, quanto_vol, quanto_rho FROM td_dmaqvol WHERE std_date = (SELECT MAX(std_date) FROM td_dmaqvol) ORDER BY vol DESC LIMIT 100

question: 변동성 시계열 추이
sql: SELECT std_date, AVG(vol) AS avg_vol FROM td_dmaqvol GROUP BY std_date ORDER BY std_date DESC LIMIT 200

question: 전체 변동성 평균 추이
sql: SELECT std_date, AVG(vol) AS avg_vol, MAX(vol) AS max_vol FROM td_dmaqvol GROUP BY std_date ORDER BY std_date DESC LIMIT 200

question: 기간별 시장 변동성 흐름
sql: SELECT std_date, AVG(vol) AS avg_vol FROM td_dmaqvol GROUP BY std_date ORDER BY std_date DESC LIMIT 200

question: 콴토 변동성 추이
sql: SELECT std_date, AVG(quanto_vol) AS avg_quanto_vol FROM td_dmaqvol GROUP BY std_date ORDER BY std_date DESC LIMIT 200

question: quanto_vol 시계열
sql: SELECT std_date, AVG(quanto_vol) AS avg_quanto_vol FROM td_dmaqvol GROUP BY std_date ORDER BY std_date DESC LIMIT 200

question: 콴토 상관계수 추이
sql: SELECT std_date, AVG(quanto_rho) AS avg_quanto_rho FROM td_dmaqvol GROUP BY std_date ORDER BY std_date DESC LIMIT 200

question: quanto_rho 시계열 변화
sql: SELECT std_date, AVG(quanto_rho) AS avg_quanto_rho, MIN(quanto_rho) AS min_rho, MAX(quanto_rho) AS max_rho FROM td_dmaqvol GROUP BY std_date ORDER BY std_date DESC LIMIT 200

question: 콴토 헤지 비율 추이
sql: SELECT std_date, AVG(quanto_rho) AS avg_quanto_rho FROM td_dmaqvol GROUP BY std_date ORDER BY std_date DESC LIMIT 200
